title: TCA protein extraction from diatoms
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"13rqj","text":"3X SDS Laemmli Buffer:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":22},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4boqi","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b8b90","text":"240 mM Tris HCl (pH 6.8) ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5i734","text":"6% SDS","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9t1tb","text":"30% Glycerol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"gs15","text":"2.28 M β-mercaptoethanol","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4snov","text":"0.06% Bromophenol blue","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f1hnt","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cql86","text":"Storerd: short term at 4°C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c55d0","text":"                long term at -20°C","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Pellet of around 50 ml of culture in exponential phase (2 million of cells)
Wash pellet with 1 ml of TCA 20%
Centrifuge at maximum speed for 1 minute
Pour off the supernatant and dilute in 100 µl of TCA 20%
Add Glass-Beads till meniscus and vortex for 7 minutes
Add 400 µl of TCA 5% and transfer the supernatant in new eppendorf (1.5 ml)
Centrifuge at 3000 rpm for 10 minutes (chiarification phase)
(now quickly!) Add 100 µl of 3X SDS Laemmli Buffer (see Materials) and vortex very well to dissolve
Add 50 µl Tris Base and vortex very well to dissolve
Centrifuge at maximum speed for 5 minutes
Transfer supernatant containing proteins in a new eppendorf
creator: Anna Santin
